source: from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from pyspark.sql import types as T
EXTRACT = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-EXTRACT"
CASE_NOTES_FILE = f"{EXTRACT}/Horizon_CaseNotes.csv"

path = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-EXTRACT/Horizon_CaseNotes.csv"

case_notes = (
    spark.read.format("csv")
    .option("header", "true")
    .option("multiLine", "true")
    .option("quote", "\"")
    .option("escape", "\"")  # handles doubled quotes ""
    .option("mode", "PERMISSIVE")
    .option("columnNameOfCorruptRecord", "_corrupt_record")
    .option("unescapedQuoteHandling", "BACK_TO_DELIMITER")
    .load(path)
)

display(case_notes)

from pyspark.sql.functions import col, trim

case_path = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-TRANSFORM/case-merged-sample-row/"

case_df = (
    spark.read.format("csv")
    .option("header", "true")
    .option("multiLine", "true")
    .option("quote", "\"")
    .option("escape", "\"")
    .option("mode", "PERMISSIVE")
    .load(case_path)
)



filtered_df = (
    case_df.select(
        "importantInformation",
        "caseNodeId",
        "caseReference",
        "caseCreateDate"
    )
    
    .filter(
        trim(col("importantInformation")).isNotNull() &
        (trim(col("importantInformation")) != "")
    )
)



important_info_notes = (
    filtered_df.select(
        col("caseNodeId").alias("caseId"),
        col("importantInformation").alias("description"),
        col("caseCreateDate").alias("createdDate"),
    )
)

display(important_info_notes)

case_notes_mapped = case_notes_combined.withColumn(
    "noteText",
    F.concat_ws(" - ", F.col("Title"), F.col("Description"))
case_notes_mapped = case_notes_mapped.withColumn("noteSource", F.lit("sticky-note"))

cases_path = f"{mpesc_base_path}/config/Cases/Cases.csv"

cases_df = (
    spark.read
        .format("csv")
        .option("header", "true")
        .option("multiLine", "true")
        .option("escape", "\"")
        .load(cases_path)
)

case_ids = (
    cases_df
        .select(F.col("Case ID").cast("string"))
        .dropna()
        .distinct()
        .rdd.flatMap(lambda x: x)
        .collect()
)

case_notes_filtered = case_notes_mapped.filter(F.col("CaseId").isin(case_ids))

display(case_notes_filtered)
print("rows after filter:", case_notes_filtered.count())

case_notes_filtered = (
    case_notes_filtered
        .withColumn("caseNodeId_str", F.col("CaseId").cast("string"))
        .join(
            cases_df
                .select(
                    F.col("Case ID").cast("string").alias("caseNodeId_str"),
                    F.col("GUID").alias("caseIdGuid")
                )
                .dropDuplicates(["caseNodeId_str"]),
            on="caseNodeId_str",
            how="left"
        )
        .drop("caseNodeId_str")
)

# Optional safety
case_notes_filtered = case_notes_filtered.filter(F.col("caseId").isNotNull())

from pyspark.sql.functions import col, trim

case_path = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-TRANSFORM/case-merged-sample-row/"

case_df = (
    spark.read.format("csv")
    .option("header", "true")
    .option("multiLine", "true")
    .option("quote", "\"")
    .option("escape", "\"")
    .option("mode", "PERMISSIVE")
    .load(case_path)
)



filtered_df = (
    case_df.select(
        "importantInformation",
        "caseNodeId",
        "caseReference",
        "caseCreateDate"
    )
    
    .filter(
        trim(col("importantInformation")).isNotNull() &
        (trim(col("importantInformation")) != "")
    )
)



display(filtered_df)

from pyspark.sql.functions import lit

filtered_df = filtered_df.withColumn(
    "noteSource",
    lit("important-info")
)

display(filtered_df)

DEFAULT_AUTHOR = "D02A7E74-C3FD-4C4D-9C9C-6E21C33282DF"


important_notes = (
    filtered_df
    .select(
        F.col("caseNodeId").cast("string").alias("CaseId"),     # legacy case id
        F.col("caseCreateDate").alias("noteDate"),
        F.lit(DEFAULT_AUTHOR).alias("authorId"),
        F.col("importantInformation").alias("noteText"),
        F.lit("important-info").alias("noteSource"),
        F.lit("legacyNote").alias("noteType")
    )
    .filter(
        F.trim(F.col("noteText")).isNotNull() &
        (F.trim(F.col("noteText")) != "")
    )
)


case_notes_filtered = (
    case_notes_filtered
    .unionByName(important_notes, allowMissingColumns=True)
)


case_notes_filtered = case_notes_filtered.dropDuplicates(
    ["CaseId", "noteText", "noteSource"]
display(case_notes_filtered)

server = "pins-sql-peas-primary-dev.database.windows.net"
database = "pins-sqldb-peas-dev"

url = (
    f"jdbc:sqlserver://{server}:1433;"
    f"database={database};"
    "encrypt=true;"
    "trustServerCertificate=false;"
    "hostNameInCertificate=*.database.windows.net;"
    "loginTimeout=30;"
)

user = "peas_app_ZXzkE0vP"

password = mssparkutils.credentials.getSecret(
    "pinskvsynwodwdevuks",
    "mpesc-sql-password"
)


user_df = (
    spark.read
    .format("jdbc")
    .option("url", url)
    .option("dbtable", "dbo.[User]")
    .option("user", user)
    .option("password", password)
    .load()
    .select("legacyId", "idpUserId")
)


user_clean = (
    user_df
    .filter(
        (F.col("legacyId").isNotNull()) &
        (F.col("legacyId") != "undefined")
    )
    .select(
        F.col("legacyId").cast("string").alias("createdBy_str"),
        F.col("idpUserId")
    )
)


DEFAULT_ID = "D02A7E74-C3FD-4C4D-9C9C-6E21C33282DF"

case_notes_filtered = (
    case_notes_filtered
    .withColumn("createdBy_str", F.col("createdBy").cast("string"))
    .join(user_clean, on="createdBy_str", how="left")
    .withColumn(
        "authorId",
        F.coalesce(F.col("idpUserId"), F.lit(DEFAULT_ID))
    )
    .drop("createdBy_str", "idpUserId")

OUTPUT_PATH = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-TRANSFORM/Horizon_CaseNotes"
(
    case_notes_filtered
    .coalesce(1)  # optional: 1 file instead of many
    .write
    .mode("overwrite")
    .option("header", "true")
    .csv(OUTPUT_PATH)
